competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Version 3.3 (May 6, 2026): /multitask command now available in the editor for running async subagents to parallelize requests instead of adding them to the queue. Context usage breakdown now visible in agent view. Prompt input undo/redo grouping improved.

Composer 2.5 (May 2026): Smarter, more reliable model for long-running tasks and complex instructions. Improved collaboration, stronger training on harder/synthetic tasks. Better at sustained work and following complex instructions more reliably.

Cursor 3 (April 2026): Unified workspace for building software with agents. Built-in browser to open, navigate, and prompt against local websites. Browse hundreds of plugins extending agents with MCPs, skills, subagents, and more.

Development Environments (April 2026, private beta → Enterprise rollout): Cursor configures Dockerfile—inspects repos, figures out tools and dependencies, produces editable/versionable configuration. Every dev environment has version history, reviewable and rollbackable.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Version 3.3 (May 6, 2026): /multitask command now available in the editor for running async subagen

changes.description: /multitask 命令：在编辑器内运行异步子 agent，并行处理请求而非排队
changes.evidence: 「The /multitask command is now available in the editor for running async subagents to parallelize requests instead of adding them to the queue」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI = 快 session，/multitask 直接实现多个并发 AI session 并行执行，向「同一协议下多 session 同步运行」延伸

changes.description: Cursor 3：统一 workspace + plugin 生态（MCPs、skills、subagents），内置浏览器
changes.evidence: 「Cursor 3 is a unified workspace for building software with agents...browse hundreds of plugins that extend agents with MCPs, skills, subagents, and more」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull 通过 MCPs 实现；锚点 #1：plugin 生态让 AI agent 形成可组合的 session 网络

changes.description: Composer 2.5：专为长任务优化，sustained work 和复杂指令遵循能力提升
changes.evidence: 「Composer 2.5 is better at sustained work on long-running tasks, follows complex instructions more reliably」

key_findings: /multitask 命令实现 editor 内并行异步子 agent——Cursor 正在把单 session 变成可并发的 multi-session 执行层
Cursor 3 定位为「用 agents 构建软件的统一 workspace」，MCPs + skills + subagents plugin 生态与 meee2 的跨工具 session 框架高度重叠
Composer 2.5 提升长任务稳定性，Cursor 正在强化「AI 作为持久任务执行者」的能力

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + Projects): Can now call Claude API directly—intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself. Combined with persistent storage, turns artifacts into a genuine microapp development environment. Artifacts now support MCP servers: connect to Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more.

Models (2026): Haiku, Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.7. 1M context window generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 at standard pricing (March 13, 2026).

Claude Code: Terminal-first agentic coding tool, GA since 2025-05-22. VS Code + JetBrains extensions. Claude Code SDK for custom agents.

MCP (March 2026): 6,000+ apps connected—Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Stripe, Figma, Zapier.

Feature surface: Projects, Artifacts, Memory, Cowork (persistent workspaces); Claude Code, Computer Use, Skills (agentic); Extended Thinking; MCP integrations.

Roadmap: Opus 5 expected to expand Agent Teams into a fully orchestrated multi-agent framework—potentially managing entire software projects from planning through deployment.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + Projects): Can now call Claude API directly—intelligent micro-app

changes.description: Artifacts 可直接调用 Claude API——artifact 本身成为有 AI 能力的 micro-app，而非静态 snapshot
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, which means you can build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live link（不是 snapshot）——artifact 现在是 live 的，内嵌 AI 逻辑，直接命中 meee2 的核心差异化

changes.description: Artifacts 支持 MCP server，可连接 Google Calendar、Gmail、Slack 等外部服务
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session / 跨工具 / 跨 owner 的 artifact pull——artifact 通过 MCP 可主动从外部工具拉取内容，liveness 已达生产级

changes.description: Opus 5 路线图：Agent Teams 演化为完整的多 agent 编排框架
changes.evidence: 「Opus 5 is expected to expand Agent Teams into a fully orchestrated multi-agent framework — potentially enabling Claude to manage entire software projects from planning through deployment」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人+AI session 同协议——若 Agent Teams 成熟，Claude.ai 将在「多 agent 协同 session」领域与 meee2 正面竞争

key_findings: Artifacts 变成 live micro-app（内嵌 AI + MCP 连接外部工具）——不再是静态渲染，直接命中 meee2「live link 不是 snapshot」的核心锚点
MCP 生态覆盖 6000+ 应用，Artifacts 可跨工具主动 pull 数据，artifact 的 liveness 已达生产级
Opus 5 Agent Teams 路线图：未来可能形成人+AI 同协议的多 agent 编排，是 meee2 最需警惕的长期方向

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Marketing Copy

## Agent Capabilities
- Autonomous Task Execution: "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously"
- Multiple Agent Options: Users can select from GitHub Copilot, Claude, Codex, and custom third-party agents
- Cloud Agent Support: Pro and Pro+ plans include access to Copilot cloud agent functionality

## Workspace & Knowledge Features
- Copilot Spaces: Creates "shared source of truth that includes context from your docs and repositories" to scale knowledge across teams
- Codebase Indexing: Enterprise customers can index their organization's codebase for "deeper understanding of customer knowledge"

## Session & Interaction Management
- Chat Thread History: "chat on github.com, mobile, and CLI Copilot...depend on using thread history to improve responses"
- Context Retention: IDE chat retains prompts/suggestions; default 28-day retention for other access methods

## Enterprise Controls
- MCP Server Access Management: Organizations can "control which MCP servers developers can access from their IDEs"
- Usage Tracking: "Detailed audit logs" enable activity monitoring across agents
- Policy Enforcement: Admins manage preview features, models, governance "from a single control plane"

## Background Operations
Agents can "plan, build, and execute complex workflows" autonomously while developers remain focused on higher-level problem-solving.
competitors.content_hash:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Marketing Copy

## Agent Capabilities
- Autonomous Task Execution: "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Ant

changes.description: 企业级 MCP Server 访问管控：组织层面控制开发者 IDE 中哪些 MCP server 可被访问
changes.evidence: 「Organizations can 'control which MCP servers developers can access from their IDEs'」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull（F9）——GitHub 在企业层面管控 MCP 跨工具连接权限，构建跨工具 session 的治理层雏形

changes.description: 新增 custom third-party agent 选项，开放第三方 agent 生态接入
changes.evidence: 「Users can select from GitHub Copilot, Claude, Codex, and custom third-party agents」

changes.description: Chat Thread 默认 28 天保留期，明确 session 上下文持久化策略
changes.evidence: 「default 28-day retention for other access methods」

key_findings: 新增 MCP Server 企业级访问管控——GitHub 开始在组织层面管理跨工具 AI 连接权限，这是跨工具 session 治理层的雏形
Custom third-party agent 支持：Copilot 正在演化为多 agent 的 orchestration 入口，而非单一 AI 助手

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent (March 24, 2026, public beta, all teams): Agent + Skills on all plans; Automations + Code Intelligence on Business/Enterprise.

Skills: Save reusable workflows from conversations—e.g., catch up on projects, draft issues from meeting notes. Trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage, where Linear can intelligently refine, synthesize, or act on it.

Code Intelligence (May 14, 2026): Extends Linear Agent to understand codebase. Code-aware tasks: diagnosing app functionality, designing technical specifications.

Deep link to coding tools (Feb 26, 2026): Launch preferred coding tool from Linear issue with prefilled prompt (issue ID, description, comments, updates, linked references, images).

Slack Integration: Spin up Slack channel automatically for each new project; all project members auto-added. Linear Agent available in project Slack channel for Q&A and actions.

Linear Releases: CI/CD integration to precisely track deployment environment, version, and status of every issue. Agents get full deployment context.

"Issue tracking is dead" (March 26, 2026): Linear CEO declares issue tracking dead; Linear adopts agentic AI as primary paradigm.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent (March 24, 2026, public beta, all teams): Agent + Skills on all plans; Automations + Code Int

changes.description: Linear Agent + reusable Skills：从对话中保存可复用工作流，自动触发 triage 流程
changes.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill...trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI = 快 session，Skills 机制让 AI agent 具备持久记忆 + 可被人触发的 session 能力，向「人+AI 同协议」演进

changes.description: 「Issue tracking is dead」：Linear CEO 宣布彻底转向 agentic AI 范式
changes.evidence: 「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」（The Register, March 26, 2026）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：Descriptive-first——Linear 正在从「描述任务（issue）」转向「flow 从真实行为 emerge」的范式，与 meee2 的 descriptive canvas 方向结构重叠

changes.description: Code Intelligence（May 14）：Linear Agent 延伸至代码库理解，支持代码感知任务
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase and supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」

key_findings: Linear Agent + Skills 让 AI 具备可复用的持久 session 记忆，并可被人触发——正在向「人+AI 同协议」框架演进
CEO 宣布「issue tracking is dead」，Linear 完成战略转型：从 issue tracker → agentic 工作协调平台，与 meee2 的 session-centric 定位正面交叉
Code Intelligence（May 14）将 agent 的理解延伸到代码库层面，Linear 的 agent 能力边界在快速扩展

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Developer Platform (May 13, 2026 — Notion 3.5): External Agents API—bring external agents (Claude, Codex, Decagon, etc.) into Notion, working out of the box. Orchestration layer: coordinates AI work across multiple tools and databases; enables multistep workflows that pull from any database.

Notion MCP: Connects to Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry.

Notion Workers: Hosted runtime for custom code. Deploy via CLI, run in secure sandbox. Starting August 11, 2026: Workers run on Notion credits.

Positioning: "hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases".

Custom Agents Management: Control who creates agents and their spending limits.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Developer Platform (May 13, 2026 — Notion 3.5): External Agents API—bring external agents (Claude, Codex, D

changes.description: Developer Platform + External Agents API：Notion 构建 agent 编排层，引入 Claude/Codex 等外部 agent
changes.evidence: 「By building an orchestration layer — a system that coordinates AI work across multiple tools and data sources — Notion is positioning itself as more than a note-taker with AI features and instead as a hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull——Notion 通过 MCP + External Agents API 构建跨工具数据协调层，但定位仍以文档为中心，范式差异明显

changes.description: Notion Workers：托管代码运行时，将 Notion 从文档平台扩展为 serverless 执行环境
changes.evidence: 「Notion Workers are a hosted runtime for custom code, so you can extend Notion without running your own servers」

key_findings: Notion 3.5 开放 Developer Platform + External Agents API，从「文档+AI」转向「agent 编排 hub」，MCP 覆盖 11 个主流 SaaS 工具
定位从 workspace 向 integration platform 延伸，但产品范式仍以文档为驱动核心，与 meee2 session 范式的结构差异仍明显

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

AI in Workflow Builder: Generate AI Response step in any automation—point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists). Rolling out April 21-30, Business+ v2 and Enterprise+.

Slackbot Rebuilt (GA, Business+ and Enterprise+): Full AI agent. Searches enterprise data, drafts documents, takes actions on behalf of employees. Coordinates multiple agents in real-time: e.g., Analytics Agent + Sales Agent for meeting briefing. Automatically drafts account strategy canvas; retrieves files from Box; finds calendar time. Delivers in single organized thread.

AI Agent Development Tools: `slack create agent` command, Bolt framework, BYOL. Supports Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI. Open-source Starter Agent + Support Agent sample apps.

Canvas AI: Writing assistance built into canvas—summarizes, extracts action items, generates first draft.

Positioning: "Agentic work operating system".
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

AI in Workflow Builder: Generate AI Response step in any automation—point at knowledge sources (channels, canvas

changes.description: Slackbot 重构为多 agent 协调器：单 thread 内实时协调 Analytics Agent、Sales Agent 等多个专项 agent
changes.evidence: 「asking 'Prepare my briefing for the Acme expansion meeting' will ping an Analytics Agent to visualize adoption data and a Sales Agent to pull relevant success stories」

changes.description: Slack 自我定位为「agentic work operating system」
changes.evidence: 「These features represent Slack's push toward becoming what they call an 'agentic work operating system' with AI embedded throughout the platform」

key_findings: Slackbot 从通知工具升级为多 agent 编排器，可在单 thread 内协调多个专项 agent 并整合外部工具（Box、Google Calendar）
「Agentic work operating system」定位表明 Slack 正在扩张到 meee2 相邻的「工作协调」领域，但产品范式仍以 comms thread 为中心，无结构威胁

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

AI Features (launched September 2025): Graph-aware AI understanding note connections (not just individual content). Chat-based search with AI—"like talking directly with your brain". Prompt templates for action items and meeting key takeaways.

AI Backends: User-selectable GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

Sync: Real-time cross-device sync including iOS with offline capability. iPad received SQLite rewrite for major performance improvement.

Kindle Sync: Highlights sync automatically—marked content appears in Reflect next day.

Calendar Integration: Meeting notes automatically linked to calendar events; timeline view for chronological context.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

AI Features (launched September 2025): Graph-aware AI understanding note connections (not just individual content)

changes.description: Graph-aware AI：AI 理解笔记间的连接关系，而非孤立分析每条笔记
changes.evidence: 「Reflect Notes launched AI features claiming to be first note-taking app where AI understands your entire note graph—connections between notes, not just individual note content」

key_findings: Reflect 的 graph-aware AI 是差异化点，但产品定位仍限于个人笔记，与 meee2 的协作 session 框架无结构重叠
无新的威胁信号；Kindle 同步、日历关联等为外围功能迭代

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Raycast 2.0 Public Beta (May 2026): macOS + Windows. Redesigned Liquid Glass UI. AI voice dictation across apps. Files/folders/contacts in Root Search. Faster indexing, improved hotkeys.

Agents (formerly Presets): Shared configuration reused across chats—updating agent config applies to every chat using it. Memory: chats remember personal context. Skills: custom instructions and knowledge for frequent tasks.

Dynamic Loading: Skills and AI Extensions load into chat dynamically when relevant—no manual invocation needed.

Parallel Background Chats: Run multiple parallel background chats. Branch off any message to explore alternate direction without losing original thread.

OpenRouter: Access wide range of public models without subscription.

Experimental: MCP HTTP Servers support; AI Extensions for Ollama models with tool calling.

GitHub Integration: Assign issues to Copilot agent from Raycast; monitor Copilot agent logs live in Raycast.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Raycast 2.0 Public Beta (May 2026): macOS + Windows. Redesigned Liquid Glass UI. AI voice dictation across apps

changes.description: Raycast 2.0：Agents + Memory + Skills + 并行后台 chat，launcher 演化为持久记忆的 multi-session 管理器
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents, and they're reused across chats...Memory has been added so chats remember context about you...you can now run multiple parallel background chats」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层——Raycast 是 macOS launcher，现在有并行后台 session + agent memory，与 meee2「不切焦点戳任何 session」的 peripheral 定位有一定重叠，但无协议层

changes.description: MCP HTTP Servers 实验性支持 + AI Extensions 动态加载（无需手动召唤）
changes.evidence: 「Available experiments include MCP HTTP Servers support...Skills and AI Extensions are now loaded into the chat dynamically when they're relevant, so you don't need to mention them manually」

key_findings: Raycast 2.0 引入 Agents + Memory + Skills + parallel background chats——peripheral launcher 正在演化为有持久记忆的 multi-session 管理器
扩展至 Windows 说明 Raycast 不再是 macOS-only 工具，但与 meee2 peripheral 层的直接重叠仍有限（无 session 协议层）

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Replit Agent 4: Multi-agent parallel execution. Large tasks automatically decomposed into sub-agent forks running concurrently; dedicated sub-agents resolve merge conflicts. Auth, DB logic, backend, and frontend built simultaneously.

Collaborative Workspace: Multiple team members submit requests simultaneously; agent sequences and executes in optimal order. Teammates work in own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent. Tasks run in background; team members track status, review, approve before merge into main project.

Design Canvas: Free-form design exploration with "Generate variants" on any element, applied directly to app.

Positioning: "Knowledge work platform"—canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos. Targets 10x faster production-ready software delivery.

Four Pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Replit Agent 4: Multi-agent parallel execution. Large tasks automatically decomposed into sub-agent forks running conc

changes.description: Agent 4：多人共享 agent session——多成员同时提交请求，agent 在后台并行执行并等待成员审批后 merge
changes.evidence: 「Rather than one person directing the agent sequentially, multiple team members can submit requests simultaneously while the agent intelligently sequences and executes them...Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人 = 慢 session，AI = 快 session，同一协议——Replit 的「人+agent 共享 session」模式是对 meee2 核心协议的一种具体实现，但限于代码构建场景

changes.description: Replit 从代码运行平台扩展为「knowledge work platform」，涵盖 canvas/slides/videos
changes.evidence: 「Replit is positioning itself as a fully integrated productivity suite, with a canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos, and others, expanding scope to more knowledge work tasks」

key_findings: Agent 4 的多人共享 agent session 是对「人+AI 同协议执行」的具体尝试，但仍限于代码构建场景，与 meee2 的通用 session 框架有明显边界
Replit 向「knowledge work platform」扩张，场景边界在模糊，值得持续观察是否会进入 general workspace 领域

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only): Claude Code + Open Code agent integration. Pipes voice transcripts into terminal agent—use with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any agentic coding app without keyboard.

v2.12.0 (April 2026): New Modes design with dedicated settings view and improved activation flow. Per-mode keyboard shortcuts.

Cloud AI Models: Gemini and Grok added as remote cloud AI model options. Enhanced Gemini multilingual support.

ElevenLabs Scribe: Added as new cloud transcription provider.

Other: Recording retention settings, lower volume during recording, per-mode autocapitalize toggle.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only): Claude Code + Open Code agent integration. Pipes voice transcripts into termin

changes.description: v2.13.0：voice → terminal agent pipeline，无需键盘接入 Cursor/Claude Code 等 agentic 编程工具
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper added Claude Code and Open Code agent integration in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only). The integration pipes transcripts into the terminal agent, allowing you to use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app, without touching your keyboard」

key_findings: Superwhisper 深化 agentic coding 工具集成，定位为 voice layer 而非独立 workspace，与 meee2 无结构重叠

alerts.headline: Cursor 3 统一 workspace + /multitask 并行子 agent：向 meee2 session 协议正面逼近
alerts.evidence: 「The /multitask command is now available in the editor for running async subagents to parallelize requests」；「Cursor 3 is a unified workspace for building software with agents...browse hundreds of plugins that extend agents with MCPs, skills, subagents, and more」
alerts.action_suggestion: 追踪 Cursor 3 的 MCPs+skills+subagents plugin 生态细节：若 plugin 间可共享 session context（而非各自孤立），将直接命中 meee2 的跨工具 artifact live link 锚点。建议在下次 build 中演示 meee2 的 session 同构优势（人与 AI 在同一协议下，而非 AI 是工具的扩展插件）

alerts.headline: Artifacts = live micro-app with MCP：「artifact 不是 snapshot」的命题 Anthropic 已落地
alerts.evidence: 「Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, which means you can build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself」；「Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more」
alerts.action_suggestion: meee2 的「跨工具 artifact live link（不是 snapshot）」锚点已被 Anthropic 自己的产品触碰。需要在 meee2 的 artifact liveness 上找差异化：(1) 跨工具 ownership——artifact 可被任意 session pull，不限于创建它的 Claude 会话；(2) Descriptive-first——用真实行为描述驱动 artifact 生成，而非用户手动构建 micro-app

alerts.headline: Linear Agent + reusable Skills + CEO 宣布「issue tracking is dead」：全面转向 agentic 工作协调
alerts.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill...trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage」；「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 的 Skills 机制（从对话中保存可复用 workflow）是一种轻量 descriptive-first 实现。需观察 Skills 是否会扩展为跨 session、跨工具的 flow。meee2 应在「谁是 session 的 owner」上强化差异化叙事——人是 session 内的参与者（而非 session 的配置者），这是 Linear Agent 目前做不到的

alerts.headline: 新增 MCP Server 企业级访问管控：GitHub 开始在组织层面治理跨工具 AI 连接权限
alerts.evidence: 「Organizations can 'control which MCP servers developers can access from their IDEs'」
alerts.action_suggestion: GitHub 的 MCP 管控层目前聚焦于「哪些工具可连接」的权限管理，尚未触及「session 间如何协调」的协议层。meee2 应在本季度明确差异化：meee2 的价值在于 session 协议本身（人+AI 同协议），而不是 session 的权限管理层。持续观察 Copilot Spaces + MCP 控制层是否会演化出跨 session context 共享机制
